options.command: bunx --bun tsup --config tsup.config.ts && bunx --bun tsc --project tsconfig.dts.json --pretty false && mkdir -p dist/migrations && cp migrations/*.sql dist/migrations/

rm -rf .tmp-bench && bunx --bun tsc --project tsconfig.bench.json --pretty false && mkdir -p .tmp-bench/typescript/kernel/backends/sqlite/migrations && cp migrations/*.sql .tmp-bench/typescript/kernel/backends/sqlite/migrations/ && node .tmp-bench/typescript/kernel/backends/sqlite/bench/sqlite-hot-path.bench.js

rm -rf .tmp-bench && bunx --bun tsc --project tsconfig.bench.json --pretty false && mkdir -p .tmp-bench/typescript/kernel/backends/sqlite/migrations && cp migrations/*.sql .tmp-bench/typescript/kernel/backends/sqlite/migrations/ && node .tmp-bench/typescript/kernel/backends/sqlite/bench/sqlite-load-cost.bench.js

rm -rf .tmp-bench && bunx --bun tsc --project tsconfig.bench.json --pretty false && mkdir -p .tmp-bench/typescript/kernel/backends/sqlite/migrations && cp migrations/*.sql .tmp-bench/typescript/kernel/backends/sqlite/migrations/ && node .tmp-bench/typescript/kernel/backends/sqlite/bench/sqlite-retention-dry-run.js
node -e "const Database=require('better-sqlite3'); const db=new Database(':memory:'); console.log(db.prepare('SELECT 1 AS value').get().value); db.close();"

rm -rf .tmp-tests && bunx --bun tsc --project tsconfig.test.json --pretty false && mkdir -p .tmp-tests/typescript/kernel/backends/sqlite/migrations && cp migrations/*.sql .tmp-tests/typescript/kernel/backends/sqlite/migrations/ && node --experimental-test-module-mocks --test .tmp-tests/typescript/kernel/backends/sqlite/test/*.test.js
